capability_questions.capability_name: Service exists and is in good condition

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a SOC service?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise have a SOC service.

questions.prompt: Is the SOC service reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Is the SOC service reviewed frequently for efficacy.

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise formalize and document all KPIs and KRIs for the SOC service?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise formalize and document all KPIs and KRIs for the SOC service.
questions.evaluation_focus: Documented KPIs and KRIs for SOC service

questions.prompt: Are the KPIs and KRIs for the SOC reviewed frequently?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Are the KPIs and KRIs for the SOC reviewed frequently.

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a unified SOC system that processes all raw logs and provides SOC capabilities?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise have a unified SOC system that processes all raw logs and provides SOC capabilities.
questions.evaluation_focus: Unified SOC system processing raw logs

questions.prompt: Does the SOC apply to the entire enterprise or are there multiple SOC systems?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the SOC apply to the entire enterprise or are there multiple SOC systems.
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise-wide or multiple SOC deployment scope

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise deploy SOAR initiatives as part of SOC?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise deploy SOAR initiatives as part of SOC.
questions.evaluation_focus: SOAR initiatives as part of SOC

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise review SOC configs and log processing as part of SOC review?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise review SOC configs and log processing as part of SOC review.
questions.evaluation_focus: SOC config and log processing review

questions.prompt: Does the SOC system integrate with other systems like vulnerability management, patch management, or even the enforcement point?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the SOC system integrate with other systems like vulnerability management, patch management, or even the enforcement point.
questions.evaluation_focus: Integration with vulnerability, patch management, and enforcement points

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a clear hierarchy of T1, T2, and T3 analysts to analyse and correlate incidents and make sure that anomalies are captured?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise have a clear hierarchy of T1, T2, and T3 analysts to analyse and correlate incidents and make sure that anomalies are captured.
questions.evaluation_focus: T1, T2, and T3 analyst hierarchy for incident analysis

questions.prompt: Are the recruited entities FTEs of the enterprise or contractors?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Are the recruited entities FTEs of the enterprise or contractors.

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalised and documented process to follow in order to escalate incidents?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise have a formalised and documented process to follow in order to escalate incidents.

questions.prompt: Is the incident escalation process automatically performed by the SOC system?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Is the incident escalation process automatically performed by the SOC system.
questions.evaluation_focus: Automated incident escalation by SOC system

questions.prompt: Is the incident escalation process reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Is the incident escalation process reviewed frequently for efficacy.

questions.prompt: Does the SOC system have capability to perform behavioural analysis?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the SOC system have capability to perform behavioural analysis.

questions.prompt: Does the SOC system perform behavioural analysis automatically?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the SOC system perform behavioural analysis automatically.

questions.prompt: Are the results of the behavioural analysis reviewed frequently for accuracy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Are the results of the behavioural analysis reviewed frequently for accuracy.

questions.prompt: Does the SOC system process and correlate identity logs?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the SOC system process and correlate identity logs.

questions.prompt: Does the SOC system process and correlate device logs?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the SOC system process and correlate device logs.

questions.prompt: Does the SOC system process and correlate network logs?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the SOC system process and correlate network logs.

questions.prompt: Does the SOC system process and correlate threat information?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the SOC system process and correlate threat information.

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise engage in threat hunting activities to improve SOC capability?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise engage in threat hunting activities to improve SOC capability.

questions.prompt: Does the SOC system process and correlate application logs?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the SOC system process and correlate application logs.

questions.prompt: Does the SOC system process and correlate data logs?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the SOC system process and correlate data logs.

questions.prompt: Are compliance visibility logs sent to the SOC system for correlation?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Are compliance visibility logs sent to the SOC system for correlation.
questions.evaluation_focus: Compliance visibility logs sent to SOC

questions.prompt: Does the SOC system have capability to perform software based scanning?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the SOC system have capability to perform software based scanning.

questions.prompt: Does the SOC system perform software based scanning automatically?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the SOC system perform software based scanning automatically.

questions.prompt: Are the results of the software scanning reviewed frequently for accuracy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Are the results of the software scanning reviewed frequently for accuracy.

questions.prompt: Does the SOC have capability to monitor the logs real time?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the SOC have capability to monitor the logs real time.

questions.prompt: Does the SOC have capability to block access based on compromise threats?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the SOC have capability to block access based on compromise threats.
questions.evaluation_focus: Block access based on compromise threats

questions.prompt: Can the blocking and unblocking of compromised or remediated resources be performed automatically?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Can the blocking and unblocking of compromised or remediated resources be performed automatically.
questions.evaluation_focus: Automatic blocking and unblocking of compromised or remediated resources

capability_questions.capability_name: Monitoring KPI/KRI of various management services

questions.prompt: Does the SOC support other systems by monitoring artifacts necessary for the respective services' KPI/KRI?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the SOC support other systems by monitoring artifacts necessary for the respective services' KPI/KRI.
questions.evaluation_focus: SOC monitors KPI/KRI artifacts for other management services

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a threat intelligence platform and a management service for threat intelligence?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise have a threat intelligence platform and a management service for threat intelligence.
questions.evaluation_focus: Threat intelligence platform and management service

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise ingest threat intelligence information and subsequent remediation recommendations automatically?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise ingest threat intelligence information and subsequent remediation recommendations automatically.
questions.evaluation_focus: Automatic threat intelligence ingestion and remediation recommendations

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise review the threat intelligence information for accuracy and relevance?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise review the threat intelligence information for accuracy and relevance.
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent threat intelligence accuracy and relevance review

questions.prompt: Does the threat intelligence integrate with SOC and other segments for providing contextual information?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the threat intelligence integrate with SOC and other segments for providing contextual information.
questions.evaluation_focus: Threat intelligence integration with SOC and other segments

questions.prompt: Does the SOC have capability to identify enterprise trends and showcase them on the dashboard?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the SOC have capability to identify enterprise trends and showcase them on the dashboard.
questions.evaluation_focus: Identify enterprise trends on SOC dashboard

questions.prompt: Does the SOC system have capability to identify the trends automatically?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the SOC system have capability to identify the trends automatically.

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise review identified trends for accuracy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise review identified trends for accuracy.
